description_long: This is a heavily armored tracked combat vehicle, featuring a large, centrally mounted main cannon on a rotating turret. The exterior is covered in angular, sloped armor plating with a distinctive green, black, and tan camouflage pattern. The vehicle is equipped with additional weapon mounts, including a coaxial machine gun and a secondary gun on the turret roof. Visible details include storage boxes, external fuel drums at the rear, and various hatches and periscopes for crew access and visibility. The tracks are robust, with multiple road wheels and reinforced side skirts for added protection. Military markings, such as a white number '661' and insignia, are visible on the side of the hull.
description: A camouflaged, heavily armored tracked combat vehicle with a large turret-mounted cannon, side skirts, and visible military markings. Features include multiple weapon mounts, storage compartments, and external fuel drums.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sloped frontal armor, main cannon, and turret details, with hatches and periscopes visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the full length of the cannon, side skirts, tracks, external fuel drum, and the '661' marking.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back armor, external fuel drums, and rear hatches, with the tracks and side skirts visible.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the turret, cannon, side skirts, tracks, and additional storage compartments.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large main cannon on the turret, one coaxial machine gun, and one secondary machine gun mount on the turret roof.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped, and modular armor plating, including reinforced side skirts and turret armor.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Woodland camouflage pattern with irregular patches of green, black, and tan in a disruptive style.
attribute_military_markings: White number '661' on the side of the hull, small insignia on the turret and hull sides.
